## Checks

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` clean
- [ ] `pnpm lint` clean
- [ ] `pnpm test` green
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @tide/web test:e2e` green (if UI changes)

- [ ] CHANGELOG entry under [Unreleased]
